description: Marketplace for the Multi-Agent Loop Kit. The repo is its own single-plugin marketplace.

metadata.description: Marketplace for the Multi-Agent Loop Kit. The repo is its own single-plugin marketplace.

plugins.name: loop
plugins.description: Turn any repo into a supervised multi-agent loop: spawn parallel coding agents in git worktrees, track them on a radar, and keep a human in the approval loop.
